package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_strings_join_single_element_loop: Layer: String handling. Flag repeated strings.Join calls in loops where one builder outside the loop would do.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario598Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
